title: Legendary Maces Resource Pack
description: This is the resource pack needed for the legendary maces plugin, it can be used for custom maces aswell though just type the names in anvil.
body:
# Legendary Maces Resource Pack
## What is the resource pack?
This resource pack adds **custom textures and visuals for legendary-style maces**, designed primarily for use with the plugin but fully compatible with other systems such as Anvil renaming and similar item-based setups. The pack focuses on giving maces a more unique, powerful, and visually distinctive appearance while keeping the vanilla Minecraft style and balance intact.

Each mace is designed to feel **special and recognizable**, making it perfect for RPG-style servers, custom loot systems, or progression-based gameplay. The pack is **lightweight**, easy to install, and works alongside most other resource packs without conflicts.
## How does it work?
To make it work go ahead and install it, after you installled it make sure you are on **1.21.11 but it works lower until 1.21.6**, in game drag your resource pack to the folder with the resource packs and select it.
To redesign the mace into a custom one either **upload the plugin to your server** (link is at the end) or **rename it in the anvil** with these names:

**Heavenly Mace**

**Hell Mace**

**Bedrock Mace**

**Lunge Mace**

**Demigod Mace**



### Features
• Custom legendary mace designs
• Made for plugin integration but works with Anvil renaming and similar methods
• Lightweight and optimized
# THE LINK FOR THE PLUGIN
https://modrinth.com/plugin/legendary-maces
